flashcards.definition: Ionizing radiation technique; best for bone structures and fractures.
Computed Tomography; multiple X-ray slices assembled into cross-sectional images.
Magnetic Resonance Imaging; uses magnetic fields for excellent soft-tissue detail, no radiation.
Uses sound waves; safe (no radiation), commonly used for fetal imaging.
Positron Emission Tomography; radioactive tracers reveal metabolic activity (cancer, brain).
